layers.name: Frontend (React)
layers.description: React UI, modules, pages, shared components

layers.name: Backend Core
layers.description: App bootstrap, config, middleware, DB session

layers.name: Agent & Tutor
layers.description: AI tutor loop, capabilities, WebSocket turns

layers.name: Knowledge & RAG
layers.description: Dutch corpus search, user document RAG, embeddings

layers.name: Learning & Memory
layers.description: Quizzes, mastery paths, L2/L3 learner memory

layers.name: Platform Services
layers.description: Auth, AI settings, LLM clients, extensions

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with README for purpose, stack, and local dev setup.

tour.title: Backend Entry Point
tour.description: FastAPI app factory, middleware, lifespan warmup, health routes.

tour.title: Frontend Bootstrap
tour.description: Vite React entry, routing, auth provider, React Query client.

tour.title: Tutor Turn Flow
tour.description: HTTP and WebSocket tutor execution, agent orchestrator, turn persistence.

tour.title: Knowledge Search
tour.description: BM25 Dutch corpus, optional PostgreSQL FTS, search cache.

tour.title: User Document RAG
tour.description: Upload, chunk, embed, pgvector retrieval, answer synthesis.

tour.title: Learner Memory
tour.description: L2 traces and L3 profile slots, synthesis tasks, context injection.

tour.title: Learning Modules
tour.description: Quizzes, mastery path, progress tracking, story sessions.

tour.title: Dashboard UI
tour.description: Main dashboard shell, tabs, tutor chat panel, settings.

tour.title: LLM Integration
tour.description: Task clients, retries, circuit breaker, provider registry.
